creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
I must say that it is not an issue with p5-Locale-libintl but your perl installation.
Please run the following commands:

cd /usr/ports/lang/perl5.34/
make do-clean
make deinstall
rm /usr/local/bin/perl
make install

After that, check if your /usr/local/bin/perl points to /usr/local/bin/perl5.34.3
